objectives: Create 4 runnable examples in crates/mx20022/examples/ using umbrella crate
Create 3 criterion benchmark suites in crate-local benches/ directories
Register all examples and benches in Cargo.toml files
Ensure all 4 quality gates pass: check, test, clippy, fmt
constraints: Examples use paths relative to crate root: ../../../testdata/...
Benches registered with harness = false in each crate's Cargo.toml
criterion.workspace = true added as dev-dependency to 3 crates
mx20022 umbrella Cargo.toml updated: mx20022-model now has features = ['all']
important_facts: All 4 examples run successfully and produce correct output
cargo check, test, clippy, fmt all pass cleanly
translate_mt103 shows MT103 fields then translates to pacs.008 XML
roundtrip shows MT103->pacs.008->MT103 with field-level spot checks (all OK)
Benchmarks cover: parse (3 fns), validate (5 fns), translate (5 fns)
decisions_made: Put examples in crates/mx20022/examples/ not workspace root (virtual workspace has no [package])
Put benches in each respective crate's benches/ dir (avoids ugly relative paths from umbrella)
Include only parse, validate, translate benches — not a combined umbrella bench (cleaner separation)
Added SepaValidator bench alongside FedNow for broader coverage
artifacts: crates/mx20022/Cargo.toml (modified: added [[example]] entries, features=[all] for model)

iteration.summary: Created 4 runnable examples and 3 criterion benchmark suites for the mx20022 workspace. All examples produce meaningful output verified by actually running them. All quality gates (cargo check, test, clippy, fmt) pass cleanly. The benchmarks cover XML parse/detect/serialize, IBAN/BIC/FedNow/SEPA validation, and MT103 parse/translate/roundtrip paths.
next_actions: Run benches with: cargo bench -p mx20022-parse / mx20022-validate / mx20022-translate
Consider adding more message types to examples (pain.001, camt.053)
Consider adding --release mode benchmark baseline to docs/
